---
author:
  - name: Benjamin C. Williams
  - name: Peter-John F. Hulson
date: November 2026

params: 
  chapter: 10
  species: "northern rockfish"
  species_complex: "no"
  area: "Gulf of Alaska"
  tier: 3

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    css: "styles.css"
  pdf:
    template-partials:
      - _extensions/safe/before-body.tex
      - _extensions/safe/_titlepage.tex
    include-in-header: _extensions/safe/in-header.tex
    keep-tex: true # Good for debugging
  docx:
    reference-doc: "_extensions/safe/template.docx"
fontsize: 11pt
mainfont: "Times New Roman"
geometry:
  - top=1in
  - bottom=1in
  - left=1in
  - right=1in 
bibliography: "safe_bibby.bib"
csl: "fishfish.csl"
title: "`r paste0(params$chapter, '. Assessment of the ', tools::toTitleCase(params$species), if(params$species_complex == 'no') ' Stock' else ' Stock Complex', ' in the ', params$area)`"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.pos = "!h")

source(here::here("R", "setup.R"))

```

This report may be cited as:
Authors, Year. Title. North Pacific Fishery Management Council, Anchorage, AK. Available from https://www.npfmc.org/library/safe-reports/

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\textit{This information is distributed solely for the purpose of pre-dissemination peer review under applicable information quality guidelines. It has not been formally disseminated by the National Marine Fisheries Service and should not be construed to represent any agency determination or policy.}
:::

::: {.content-visible unless-format="pdf"}
*This information is distributed solely for the purpose of pre-dissemination peer review under applicable information quality guidelines. It has not been formally disseminated by the National Marine Fisheries Service and should not be construed to represent any agency determination or policy.*
:::


```{r}
#| label: load
library(safe)
# globals
species = params$species
year = 2022
date = 'October 22, 2022'
model = "base"
end_proj = year + 15
best_f = 0.0641 # from the best_f function in groundfishr package
ofl = 8000 # placeholder while i figure things out

# todo: read from proj output
c1 = 2842 # estimated catch in current year
c2 = 3489 # proj catch year + 1
c3 = 2884 # proj catch year + 2
# todo: build a function/switch to auto run the tier(a/b) - also for overfishing/overfished
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include 01-summary.qmd >}}

{{< include 02-responses.qmd >}}

{{< include 03-intro.qmd >}}

{{< include 04-fishery.qmd >}}

{{< include 05-data.qmd >}}

{{< include 06-model.qmd >}}

{{< include 07-results.qmd >}}

{{< include 08-abc.qmd >}}

{{< include 09-ecosystem.qmd >}}

{{< include 10-gaps.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::

{{< include 11-tables.qmd >}}

{{< include 12-figures.qmd >}}

{{< include 13-append_a.qmd >}}

{{< include 14-append_vast.qmd >}}
